final_prompt.prompt:

Composition: must be 9:16 vertical full-screen layout optimized for mobile display
Subject: must include the OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone as the hero product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs dramatic product lighting with strong visual impact — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Ultra" (brand and model name)
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 resolution, brand exposure priority, visual impact first
Avoid:
